def main():
GALT = 6"0000TBENCH-SALT”

img_ bytes = read_file_ bytes( ‘Tapp/code.png’)
hO = cha256(img_ bytes)

# cha2z56(ho // hof-t0] |/ SALT)
H = cha256(ho, hof:10], SALT)

print(H.bex())

action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "I can see the pseudocode extracted by OCR, though there are some OCR errors. Let me analyze what this code is supposed to do: 1) It defines a salt string, 2) Reads the image file bytes, 3) Computes SHA256 hash of the image, 4) Computes another SHA256 hash using part of the first hash and the salt, 5) Prints the result in hex. I need to implement this logic, correcting the OCR errors.",
